2025-slovenia.name: Slovenia 2025 Road Trip
2025-slovenia.description: A 9-day scenic journey through Slovenia, covering lakes, mountains, and coastal towns.

itinerary.highlights: Road trip start, exploring Maribor before reaching Bled.

activities.description: Early departure from Bratislava (~3.5-hour drive).
Stop in Maribor – explore Old Town, Pyramid Hill, and the Drava River promenade.
Continue to Bled/Bohinj (~2-hour drive), check into accommodation.

itinerary.highlights: Exploring Bled Lake, Castle, and the famous gorge.

activities.description: Walk around Lake Bled and take a pletna boat to Bled Island.
Visit Bled Castle and hike through Vintgar Gorge.
Relax at a lakeside café or explore Bled Town.

itinerary.highlights: Scenic mountain views and Slovenia's largest lake.

activities.description: Take the Vogel Cable Car for stunning mountain views.
Explore Lake Bohinj, visit Savica Waterfall, or take a short hike.
Return to accommodation for a relaxed evening.

itinerary.highlights: Scenic drive through Vršič Pass and ziplining in Bovec.

activities.description: Drive through Vršič Pass (~1.5 hours) with optional short hike to Slemenova Špica (~2–3 hours). Stop at Russian Chapel & Lake Jasna.
Lunch in Bovec, check into accommodation, then enjoy ziplining (~2 hours).

itinerary.highlights: Outdoor adventures in the stunning Soča Valley.

activities.description: Guided tour of Kobarid Museum, or choose an alternative activity (hike, cheese tasting, rafting).
Go kayaking on the Soča River.

itinerary.location: Full-Day Hike → Drive to the Coast
itinerary.highlights: Hiking in Triglav National Park, then heading to the seaside.

activities.description: Full-day hike in Soča Valley (Soča Trail, Krn Lake, or Seven Lakes Valley).
Drive to Piran/Portorož (~2.5–3 hours).
Check into seaside accommodation, walk around Piran Old Town.

itinerary.highlights: Relaxing beach day followed by a trip to Trieste.

activities.description: Relax at Piran or Portorož Beach.
Drive to Trieste (~30 min) and explore Piazza Unità d’Italia, Grand Canal, and Castello di Miramare.
Dinner at a harborside Italian restaurant, then drive back to Piran (~30 min).

itinerary.highlights: Exploring Postojna Cave, Predjama Castle, and arriving in Ljubljana.

activities.description: Drive to Postojna Cave (~1 hour), visit the cave and Predjama Castle.
Drive to Ljubljana (~40 min) and explore the Old Town.

itinerary.highlights: Final day, optional stop in Graz before returning home.

activities.description: Enjoy breakfast and explore Ljubljana.
Drive back to Bratislava (~4.5 hours). Optional stop in Graz for sightseeing & lunch.
